title: VxRail vSAN Encryption Key Manager Reachability Audit
app: vSAN encryption health from vCenter extension mirrored to `vxrail:vsan`
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:vsan" earliest=-24h
| eval cs=lower(crypto_state)
| where cs!="healthy" OR now()-tonumber(last_rotation_epoch)>15552000
| stats latest(crypto_state) as state, latest(kmip_server) as kms by cluster_id
description: KMS outages or stale rotation policies risk compliance findings and data access issues during host rebuilds.
value: Protects encryption SLAs for regulated workloads on HCI.
implementation: Ingest crypto health daily. Alert on degraded. Track rotation age against policy (example 180-day warning).
visualization: Table clusters vs KMS; timeline state; single value overdue rotations.
grandmaExplanation: We watch your integrated rack-scale cluster—disks, updates, support uploads, and copy jobs—so small hardware or software issues do not grow into long outages.
